summary: Dashboard uses Express API server + Vite-built React SPA with inline styles
context: Phase 3 requires a web dashboard for viewing benchmark results, comparing conditions, and exporting data. Need to serve both API routes and a React frontend.
rationale: Express serves API routes backed by existing ResultsStore/IndexManager. Vite builds the React SPA separately (excluded from tsconfig). In production, Express serves the static bundle from dist/dashboard/. In dev, Vite proxy forwards /api to Express. Inline styles used for components to avoid CSS tooling complexity in a developer-facing tool.

alternatives.option: Use Next.js or similar full-stack React framework
alternatives.reason_rejected: Heavyweight for an internal dev tool; adds SSR complexity unnecessary for a dashboard that reads local JSON files

alternatives.option: Use a separate CSS framework like Tailwind
alternatives.reason_rejected: Adds build complexity; inline styles are sufficient for ~6 components in a dark-themed dashboard
